inputs.name: checkBy
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive a node's check key from its data. Falls back to the node's data when unset.

inputs.name: checkedKeys
inputs.description: Keys of the currently checked nodes.

inputs.name: checkedKeysChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the checked keys change.

inputs.name: hasCheckbox
inputs.description: Predicate that determines whether a node displays a checkbox. When unset, every node displays a checkbox.

inputs.name: nodeCheck
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is checked or unchecked.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures check mode and whether checking a node also checks its children or parents. Merged over `{ checkChildren: true, checkParents: true, enabled: true, mode: "multiple" }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: disableBy
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive a node's disable key from its data. Falls back to the node's data when unset.

inputs.name: disabledKeys
inputs.description: Keys of the currently disabled nodes.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures whether disabling a node also disables its children. Merged over `{ disableChildren: true, enabled: true }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: nodeDrag
inputs.description: Emitted while a node is being dragged.

inputs.name: nodeDragEnd
inputs.description: Emitted when a node drag ends.

inputs.name: nodeDragStart
inputs.description: Emitted when a node drag starts.

inputs.name: nodeDrop
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is dropped.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures whether dragging nodes to reorder or reparent them is enabled. Merged over `{ enabled: true }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: collapse
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is collapsed.

inputs.name: expand
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is expanded.

inputs.name: expandBy
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive a node's expand key from its data. Falls back to the node's data when unset.

inputs.name: expandedKeys
inputs.description: Keys of the currently expanded nodes.

inputs.name: expandedKeysChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the expanded keys change.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures whether expanding and collapsing nodes is enabled. Merged over `{ enabled: true }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: filter
inputs.description: Current filter text used to narrow the visible nodes.

inputs.name: filterChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the filter value changes.

inputs.name: filterPlaceholder
inputs.description: Placeholder text shown in the filter input.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures the filter operator, case sensitivity, and debounce delay. Merged over `{ enabled: true, operator: "contains", caseSensitive: false, debounce: 0 }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: nodeSelect
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is selected or deselected.

inputs.name: selectBy
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive a node's selection key from its data. Falls back to the node's data when unset.

inputs.name: selectedKeys
inputs.description: Keys of the currently selected nodes.

inputs.name: selectedKeysChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the selected keys change.

inputs.name: selectionChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the selection changes.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configures selection mode, toggleability, and whether only child nodes are selectable. Merged over `{ childrenOnly: false, enabled: true, mode: "single", toggleable: false }` when applied bare.

inputs.name: ariaHasPopup
inputs.description:
Value forwarded to the `aria-haspopup` attribute. Set when this button triggers a popup, menu,
listbox, tree, grid, or dialog. Omit or leave as `"false"` for plain action buttons.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description:
Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.
When inside a `ButtonGroup`, the group's disabled state takes precedence.

inputs.name: iconOnly
inputs.description:
Removes horizontal padding and fixes a square aspect ratio sized to match `size`.
Provide `aria-label` on the host when using icon-only buttons.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description:
Displays a loading indicator and prevents interaction while an operation is in progress.
Sets `aria-busy="true"` on the host.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Visual style variant of the button. When inside a `ButtonGroup`, the group's look takes precedence.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description:
Border-radius preset applied to the component.
When inside a `ButtonGroup`, the group's value takes precedence.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description:
Whether the button is in the selected/pressed state. Drives `aria-pressed` when the button is toggleable.
Managed by `toggleable` click handling or by `ButtonGroup` selection policy.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description:
Size preset controlling the button's height and horizontal padding.
When inside a `ButtonGroup`, the group's value takes precedence.

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description:
Tab index of the host element. Automatically overridden to `-1` when the button is disabled or loading.
Accepts a numeric string and converts it to a number.

inputs.name: toggleable
inputs.description:
Enables toggle behavior — each click flips the `selected` state and `aria-pressed` is managed.
Must use `[toggleable]="true"` binding syntax, not bare attribute form.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the host element. Describe what the chip represents.
When empty, assistive technology announces the role without a label.

inputs.name: contentClick
inputs.description:
Emitted when the chip body is clicked or activated via Enter or Space.
Not emitted when the remove button is activated.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the chip with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Text label displayed inside the chip. When non-empty, takes precedence over projected content.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Visual style variant controlling the chip's background color, border, and interaction states.

inputs.name: removable
inputs.description: Renders a remove button inside the chip. When activated, emits the `remove` output.

inputs.name: remove
inputs.description:
Emitted when the remove button is clicked. Only fires when `removable` is `true`.
Emits the originating `Event`.

inputs.name: removeLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible label for the remove button, overriding the auto-computed `"Remove, <label>"` fallback.
Use when the chip shows only projected content and the default label is not descriptive enough.

inputs.name: removeTabIndex
inputs.description:
Tab index for the remove button, independent of the chip host's own tabindex.
Set to `-1` to exclude the remove button from tab order when an equivalent keyboard path exists elsewhere.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the chip.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description:
Whether the chip is selected. When `toggleable` is `true`, each activation flips this value.
Supports two-way binding via `[(selected)]`.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset controlling the chip's padding and remove button dimensions.

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description:
Tab index override for the chip host element. When not set, computed automatically:
`0` when `toggleable` or `removable` is `true`, `-1` otherwise. Overridden to `-1` when `disabled` is `true`.

inputs.name: toggleable
inputs.description:
Enables toggle behavior. When `true`, each activation flips `selected`
and the host receives `role="checkbox"` with `aria-checked`.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Arbitrary value associated with this chip.
Useful for identifying which chip was selected or removed in a collection.

inputs.name: tagCount
inputs.description:
Number of selected item tags to display before collapsing the rest into a summary tag.
A negative value shows every selected item as its own tag and never renders the summary tag.

inputs.name: anchor
inputs.description: The anchor element or point for the popup.

inputs.name: anchorConnectionPoint
inputs.description: The connection point for the popup anchor.

inputs.name: animation
inputs.description: The animation settings for the popup.

inputs.name: backdropClass
inputs.description: The class or classes to apply to the backdrop of the popup.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is closed.

inputs.name: closeOnBackdropClick
inputs.description:
Whether to close the popup when clicking on the backdrop.
Only applies when the popup has a backdrop.

inputs.name: closeOnEscape
inputs.description: Whether to close the popup when the escape key is pressed.

inputs.name: closeOnMouseLeave
inputs.description: Whether to close the popup when the mouse leaves the anchor element.

inputs.name: closeOnOutsideClick
inputs.description: Whether to close the popup when clicking outside of it.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Arbitrary data to pass to the popup.

inputs.name: hasBackdrop
inputs.description: Whether the popup should have a backdrop.

inputs.name: height
inputs.description: The height of the popup.

inputs.name: maxHeight
inputs.description: The maximum height of the popup.

inputs.name: maxWidth
inputs.description: The maximum width of the popup.

inputs.name: minHeight
inputs.description: The minimum height of the popup.

inputs.name: minWidth
inputs.description: The minimum width of the popup.

inputs.name: offset
inputs.description: The offset of the popup from the anchor.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is opened.

inputs.name: popupClass
inputs.description: The class or classes to apply to the popup.

inputs.name: popupConnectionPoint
inputs.description: The connection point for the popup.

inputs.name: popupWrapperClass
inputs.description: The class or classes to apply to the popup wrapper.

inputs.name: positionStrategy
inputs.description:
The strategy for positioning the popup.
`global` means the popup will be positioned relative to the viewport,
`connected` means the popup will be positioned relative to the anchor element.

inputs.name: positions
inputs.description:
The positions to use for the popup.
The popup will try to position itself in the first position that fits.
This is only used when the `positionStrategy` is set to `connected`.

inputs.name: preventClose
inputs.description:
Called when the popup is requested to close.
This can be used to prevent the popup from closing.

inputs.name: providers
inputs.description: The providers that will be injected into the popup.

inputs.name: trigger
inputs.description: The trigger event for opening the popup.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description: The width of the popup.

inputs.name: withPush
inputs.description: Whether to push the popup into the screen when it is opened.

inputs.name: closeOnScroll
inputs.description: Whether to close the popup when the user scrolls within a scrollable container.

inputs.name: restoreFocus
inputs.description:
Controls focus restoration when the popup closes.
- `true`: always restore focus to the anchor element.
- `false`: never restore focus (recommended for tooltips).
- `"auto"`: restore focus only if the anchor was focused when the popup opened.

inputs.name: withScrollTracking
inputs.description: Whether the popup should track scroll events and reposition itself.

inputs.name: animate
inputs.description: Enables CSS transitions when nodes expand or collapse.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Accessible name for the tree. Describe what the tree represents. When empty, assistive technology announces the role without a label.

inputs.name: children
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive a node's children from a data item. Accepts a property name, a function returning the children, or a function returning an observable of the children.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Collection of items to render.

inputs.name: hasChildren
inputs.description: Predicate that determines whether a node has children. Required when the children selector returns an observable.

inputs.name: idField
inputs.description: Property name that holds a node's unique identifier. Required when `mode` is set to `"flat"`.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.description: Shape of the source data: `"hierarchical"` for nested items via `children`, or `"flat"` for a flat list linked by `idField` and `parentIdField`.

inputs.name: blur
inputs.description: Emitted when the tree-view loses focus.

inputs.name: focus
inputs.description: Emitted when the tree-view gains focus.

inputs.name: nodeClick
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is clicked.

inputs.name: parentIdField
inputs.description: Property name that holds a node's parent identifier. Required when `mode` is set to `"flat"`.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description: Property name or accessor used to derive the display text from a data item.

inputs.name: allowEmpty
inputs.description:
When `false` and `selection` is `"single"`, at least one button must remain selected;
the active button cannot be deselected. Has no effect in `"multiple"` mode.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the host element. Override when multiple button groups appear on the same page
so screen reader users can distinguish them.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders all child buttons with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description:
Visual style variant propagated to all child buttons.
Also controls container-level divider and border behavior.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the container and the outer corners of the first and last child button.

inputs.name: selection
inputs.description:
Two-way bindable. Controls whether child buttons behave as a radio group (`"single"`)
or toggle independently (`"multiple"`).

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset propagated to all child buttons, overriding their individual `size` inputs.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible name for the host element. Describe what the component represents.
When empty, falls back to the placeholder text.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: ID of an external element that provides the accessible name for the host element.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emitted when the popup is about to close. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: closed
inputs.description: Emitted after the popup closes.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Collection of items to render.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Renders the component with reduced visual emphasis and removes pointer interaction.

inputs.name: itemDisabled
inputs.description: Predicate or field name used to determine whether an individual item is disabled.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Marks the field as invalid. Set automatically by the `FormField` directive when bound via `[formField]`.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description: Displays a loading indicator and prevents interaction while an operation is in progress.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Emitted when the popup is about to open. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: opened
inputs.description: Emitted after the popup opens.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Placeholder text shown when no value is selected or entered.

inputs.name: popupClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the popup element.

inputs.name: popupHeight
inputs.description: Height of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupWidth
inputs.description: Width of the popup element.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Prevents value changes while preserving the component's visual state.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Marks the field as required for form validation.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Border-radius preset applied to the component.

inputs.name: showClearButton
inputs.description: Shows a clear button that resets the selected value when clicked.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size preset controlling the component's dimensions.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description:
Property name or accessor used to derive the display text from a data item.
If omitted, the item itself is used as the display text.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the control is interacted with via blur, selection, or clear.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description: Marks the control as touched. Set automatically by the `FormField` directive when bound via `[formField]`.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: valueField
inputs.description:
Property name or accessor used to derive the value from a data item.
If omitted, the item itself is used as the value.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Currently selected value, two-way bindable and compatible with Signal Forms via `[formField]`.
When `valueField` is set, this may hold the primitive field value instead of the full data item.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Sets the aria-label attribute of the multi select component.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: Sets the aria-labelledby attribute of the multi select component.

inputs.name: autoClose
inputs.description: Closes the popup automatically after an item is selected or deselected.

inputs.name: checkboxes
inputs.description: Renders a checkbox next to each item in the popup list to indicate its selected state.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is about to close. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: closed
inputs.description: Emits after the popup is closed.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Collection of items rendered in the popup list.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Disables the component, preventing the popup from opening and blocking tag removal.

inputs.name: itemDisabled
inputs.description: A predicate function or the name of the field that determines whether an item is disabled.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description:
Marks the multi select as invalid. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description: Sets the loading state of the multi select component.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is about to open. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: opened
inputs.description: Emits after the popup is opened.

inputs.name: popupClass
inputs.description: Sets the class of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupHeight
inputs.description: Sets the height of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupWidth
inputs.description: Sets the width of the popup element.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Sets the readonly state of the multi select component.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Sets the required state of the multi select component.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the multi select component.

inputs.name: showClearButton
inputs.description: Renders a button that clears all selected items when at least one item is selected.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: The size of the multi select component.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description:
Sets the text field of the multi select component.
It can be null, string, or a function that takes an item and returns a string.
If null, the item itself will be used as the text representation.

inputs.name: touch
inputs.description:
Emitted when the multi select is interacted with on blur, selection, remove, or clear.
The `FormField` directive listens to this to mark the field as touched.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Sets the touched state of the multi select. When bound to a signal form field via `[formField]`,
this is written by the `FormField` directive.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the host element via `tailwind-merge`.

inputs.name: valueField
inputs.description:
Sets the value field of the multi select component.
It can be null, string, or a function that takes an item and returns a string.
If null, the item itself will be used as the value representation.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Two-way bindable current selected values. Implements `FormValueControl<Iterable<TData>>`,
enabling signal forms `[formField]` binding. When `valueField` is set, primitive field values can be
written into this model to restore matching selected items.
